programmes.show_description: The disturbing case of Melanie McGuire, a fertility clinic nurse, shockingly accused of shooting her husband, dismembering his body and disposing of it in suitcases dumped into Chesapeake Bay.
Tyler Clementi and Dharun Ravi were new college roommates when Ravi secretly live streamed Tyler kissing another man. Soon after Tyler committed suicide and Ravi faced surprising criminal charges.
The Witchcraft Triple Murder Trial. Did William Hartung kill his mother and two half-brothers in dark occult ritual? Or was his motive to murder his family much more basic... greed.
...With Vinnie Politan. The series looks beyond the usual suspects to bring you the gripping stories of everyday people caught up in a world of deception and manipulation as they become accomplices.
The Killing Of Ahmad Arbery. Ahmad Arbery was out jogging when three white men assumed he was a burglar, chased him down and shot him multiple times.

programmes.show_name: Victim To Verdict Chaos In Kenosha
programmes.show_description: Kyle Rittenhouse shot and killed two people and maimed a third during a Black Lives Matter protest in Kenosha, Wisconsin.

programmes.show_name: Victim To Verdict A Clown At The Door
programmes.show_description: A clown carrying balloons and a basket of flowers shot and killed Marlene Warren when she opened her front door in 1990.
